message:
🐛 Replace hardcoded max 10 replicas with configurable constant (#2303)

* 🐛 Replace hardcoded max 10 replicas with configurable constant

Scale widget hardcoded max of 10 replicas in 4 places. Extract to
MAX_SCALE_REPLICAS constant (set to 100) which is still a safe UI
guard while being practical for real-world deployments.

Fixes #2243

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Move MAX_SCALE_REPLICAS constant after all imports

Address Copilot review: constant was declared between import
statements, which is a style violation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Address review: move constant after imports, allow scale-down above limit

- Move MAX_SCALE_REPLICAS constant after all imports (fixes import ordering)
- Allow scaling down when current replicas already exceed the UI limit
- Add MIN_SCALE_REPLICAS constant for readability

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Remove unnecessary MIN_SCALE_REPLICAS constant

Replace MIN_SCALE_REPLICAS (which was just 0) with a direct literal.
Zero is self-evident as the minimum replica count and naming it adds
verbosity without clarity.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
